prompt: Create a photorealistic, collectible wildlife photograph of a mythical mountain beast inspired by ancient Chinese strange-creature lore: a leopard-like big cat with a tawny spotted coat, muscular body, open roaring mouth, one straight horn rising from the center of its forehead, and exactly seven visible long ringed tails fanning backward with pale white tips. Place the creature on a jagged high-altitude rocky ridge, facing slightly left toward the camera, standing alert and aggressive with its front paws on a ledge. Surround it with exactly 12 prominent translucent teal-green crystal pieces: two tall shards embedded in the right cliff wall, one flat block at mid-right, three broken chunks at lower right, three angular chunks along the bottom foreground, one small shard near the animal’s front paws, and two faint shards in the distant background. The environment is a cold, misty mineral mountain with dark gray fractured stone, pale fog drifting through the ravine, and a softly blurred rocky peak behind it. Use dramatic natural backlight from the upper left, rim lighting on fur and tails, detailed whiskers and teeth, realistic animal anatomy, cinematic depth of field, high dynamic range, sharp foreground texture, muted blue-gray atmosphere, no people, no text, no illustration style. Customize the creature as a horned leopard with seven tails, the setting as a jagged crystal-studded alpine ridge, the crystal color as translucent teal-green, the mood as cold misty dawn, and the camera style as top-tier wildlife photography with cinematic depth of field.
